creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 184618
patch allow urllib3 1.22

> -		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}urllib3>=1.21.1:net/py-urllib3 \
> +		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}urllib3>=1.22:net/py-urllib3 \

Looking at setup.py changes they don't preclude from using the port with py-urllib3-1.22.1. Maybe drop the hunk.
